projects.title: Signature Double Decker Stand
projects.description: A landmark double-decker stand that dominated the floor with premium materials, a VIP lounge on the upper deck, and an immersive spatial journey that mirrored the client's luxury brand promise.

projects.title: Immersive Pharma Experience Pavilion
projects.description: Clean clinical design language with interactive product display panels, a private meeting zone, and a guided visitor flow that turned walk-ins into qualified conversations.

projects.title: Technology Brand Command Centre
projects.description: Futuristic design concept with curved LED walls, interactive product demo zones, and a streamlined visitor flow designed to maximise engagement at India's leading electronics showcase.

projects.title: International Textile Showcase
projects.description: Elegant warm-toned stand celebrating the heritage of Indian textiles with texture-rich display surfaces, fabric wall installations, and a buyer's lounge designed to invite conversation.

projects.title: Automotive Innovation Stand
projects.description: High-energy stand featuring vehicle display ramps, interactive digital configurators, and a premium VIP lounge. Became the show floor landmark and generated record footfall for the client.

projects.title: FMCG Retail Experience Stand
projects.description: Vibrant consumer-facing stand with product sampling zones, bold graphic panels, and retail-style shelving that translated the brand's supermarket presence into a compelling exhibition experience.

projects.title: Healthcare Brand Pavilion
projects.description: Trust-forward design using clean whites, soft lighting, and structured demo zones. The stand positioned the client as a credible, patient-focused healthcare brand at India's top medical expo.

projects.title: Construction Materials Showcase
projects.description: Industrial-chic stand with live material samples, structural feature walls, and an architect-focused briefing zone that attracted top developers and spec writers during the event.
